text.title: Production Trace Mining Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from PII-scrubbed traces to validated trace-mining-spec artefact.

step.name: confirm-scrub
step.input: scrub spec ref + scrubbed trace path
step.action: Verify scrub spec is committed and last_reviewed within window; reject if not.
step.decision-gate: scrub spec must exist and be fresh; else block on `pii-scrubbing-recipe-for-eval-sets`

step.name: stratify-capabilities
step.input: capability taxonomy YAML + sample of scrubbed traces
step.action: Tag each trace with capability label; ensure ≥50 traces per capability or drop capability.

step.name: infer-labels
step.input: label inference rules YAML + capability frequency
step.action: Pick label inference mode: `heuristic` (high volume + known schema), `llm_judge` (low volume), `heuristic_plus_judge` (mixed).

step.name: set-trigger-and-retention
step.decision-gate: trigger value cannot contain "when needed" / "ad hoc"

step.name: audit-and-commit
step.action: Run validator; commit on green; bump version.
